notes: MiniMax M2.7 AutoRound W4A16 on 4x Intel Arc Pro B70 via vLLM/XPU TP4. Mean of two p512/n1536 repeats with greedy local-argmax decode: 60.345 and 60.650 output tok/s, 80.460 and 80.866 total tok/s. This is a correctness-qualified follow-up after finite tracing found NaNs at the tensor-parallel full-vocab logits gather. Greedy local argmax gathers only per-rank top (value,index) pairs, preserving temperature=0 argmax semantics while bypassing the corrupted full-logits gather. Quality gates passed: 32x arithmetic repeat, six-prompt semantic suite, raw145 exact token hash at n64 and n256, 0 NUL tokens, 0 control chars. No speculative decoding, no expert dropping, no quality-reducing quant change, no power-limit increase. Not valid for sampling/logprobs paths yet.

engineFlags.commandSnippet: VLLM_XPU_LOCAL_ARGMAX_DECODE=1 VLLM_BENCH_TEMPERATURE=0 VLLM_XPU_USE_LLM_SCALER_MOE=1 VLLM_XPU_ENABLE_XPU_GRAPH=1 VLLM_XPU_FORCE_GRAPH_WITH_COMM=1 VLLM_XPU_GRAPH_NOOP_COMM_CAPTURE=1 CCL_TOPO_P2P_ACCESS=1 VLLM_CACHE_ROOT=/mnt/fast-ai/vllm-cache-exp/minimax-local-argmax-repeat vllm bench throughput --backend vllm --model /mnt/fast-ai/llm-models/minimax-m2.7-int4-autoround --tokenizer /mnt/fast-ai/llm-models/minimax-m2.7-int4-autoround --trust-remote-code --dtype float16 --tensor-parallel-size 4 --distributed-executor-backend mp --max-model-len 2048 --max-num-batched-tokens 512 --max-num-seqs 1 --dataset-name random --random-input-len 512 --random-output-len 1536 --random-range-ratio 0 --num-prompts 1 --disable-log-stats --async-engine --block-size 256 --no-enable-prefix-caching --attention-backend TRITON_ATTN --compilation-config {"use_inductor_graph_partition":true,"compile_sizes":[1],"cudagraph_mode":"PIECEWISE"}
engineFlags.extraFlags: XPU/Level Zero; B70 tuned MoE config E=256,N=384,dtype=int4_w4a16; llm-scaler u4 MoE decode path; XPU piecewise graph forced with no-op communicator capture; greedy local-argmax decode bypasses full-vocab TP logits gather by pair-gathering per-rank top logits; raw145 n64/n256 exact token hashes passed; no power-limit change.
